immortal_cultivation_mod.book.name: Immortal Cultivation Manual
immortal_cultivation_mod.book.landing: A jade-bound field manual for qi, realms, spirit roots, spells, and cultivation tools.
screen.immortal_cultivation_mod.empty_co: Use Order + to add learned spells.
screen.immortal_cultivation_mod.select_s: Select a spell to view its description.
message.immortal_cultivation_mod.enlight: You consumed the Enlightenment Pill and stepped into Qi Refining.
message.immortal_cultivation_mod.qi_inje: Hold a weapon or item to inject qi.
This item has no base damage stat.
message.immortal_cultivation_mod.spell_n: You have not learned this spell.
message.immortal_cultivation_mod.lingben: Lingbeng is active. Punch a block or entity to release it.
message.immortal_cultivation_mod.max_lev: You have reached the highest level.
message.immortal_cultivation_mod.meditat: You must be on the ground to meditate.
message.immortal_cultivation_mod.fog_mir: Mirror reading: hidden formations %s | Ambient qi: %s | Spirit vein centers: %s
message.immortal_cultivation_mod.blood_n: Blood can only be refined after activating Blood Demon Method.
message.immortal_cultivation_mod.method_: Your current cultivation method has reached its limit.
message.immortal_cultivation_mod.fengya_: Wind pressure found no breakable blocks.
spell.immortal_cultivation_mod.fengya.da: 10 / 40 / 320 damage and 16 / 64 / 256 blocks, Jindan shift: 640 damage and 1024 blocks
spell.immortal_cultivation_mod.fengya.qi: 10% max qi per punch, Jindan shift: 30%
Gather spiritual qi within your palm and shape it into a blazing fireball, hurling it forth to burn foes and scorch all in its path.
Circulate spiritual power to enter the Lingbeng state. Activating it again prolongs its effects and expands the explosive flames. This technique may be stacked up to ten layers.
spell.immortal_cultivation_mod.regenerat: Guide spiritual qi to nourish the body. For three breaths, vitality continuously flows through the flesh, steadily healing wounds.
spell.immortal_cultivation_mod.beam.desc: Condense spiritual power into a unique streak of light visible only to the caster. The phenomenon lingers for ten breaths before fading.
spell.immortal_cultivation_mod.earth_esc: Sink into the earth and travel through soil and stone while greatly increasing movement speed. Consumes 8 qi each second underground and ends upon returning to the surface.
spell.immortal_cultivation_mod.cleanse.d: Recite a cleansing incantation to wash over the body, removing all lingering curses, afflictions, and negative effects.
spell.immortal_cultivation_mod.qi_gather: Focus solely on absorbing the qi of heaven and earth. While active, you possess no offensive or defensive abilities, and all damage received is tripled.
spell.immortal_cultivation_mod.lingzhi_b: Condense a thread of spiritual power at your fingertip and release it with a light flick. The qi cost is minimal, yet it can wound enemies and shatter up to three blocks of stone.
spell.immortal_cultivation_mod.wind_blad: Gather fierce winds into a razor-sharp blade. Whether slashing, cutting, or piercing, its edge can grievously wound an enemy.
spell.immortal_cultivation_mod.wind_step: A movement technique that may be toggled at will. Winds gather beneath your feet, greatly increasing speed and granting an additional midair jump. Consumes 5 qi per second.
spell.immortal_cultivation_mod.yufeng_ju: Ride the winds and drift through the air at low altitude. Consumes 30 qi per second. If no solid ground exists within twenty meters below, the power of flight is lost.
spell.immortal_cultivation_mod.smoke_art: Condense mist into a projectile and launch it forward. Those caught within the spreading smoke are blinded and unable to see for ten breaths.
spell.immortal_cultivation_mod.huti_qi.d: True qi wraps the body into a thin film, blocks mortal weapons and rubble, ineffective against cultivator spells.
spell.immortal_cultivation_mod.michen_zh: Stir dust to obscure vision, disrupt enemy ranged targeting, provides no damage reduction.
spell.immortal_cultivation_mod.sliding_w: Launch a condensed water orb that forms a shallow pool upon impact. Those who step into it find their movements distorted and their controls reversed.
spell.immortal_cultivation_mod.ignite_fl: Channel true fire into a blazing streak that races forward. Grass, wood, stone, and all it touches are set aflame.
spell.immortal_cultivation_mod.spirit_si: A spiritual eye technique that may be freely toggled. When active, night appears as bright as day. Consumes 5 qi per second.
spell.immortal_cultivation_mod.light_bea: Expend 90 qi to summon six hexagonal spirit orbs behind you, stacking up to three layers. A punch fires a single orb, while a concealed strike releases them all at once. Each orb possesses immense destructive power, capable of devastating powerful foes and shattering large areas of terrain.
spell.immortal_cultivation_mod.dielang_s: Condense layers of water-aspected spiritual power into protective shields. One layer costs 50 qi and blocks 12 damage; two layers cost 100 qi and block 36 damage; three layers cost 150 qi and withstand 108 damage.
spell.immortal_cultivation_mod.zhenshan_: Gather the power of earth and stone into a colossal palm strike. The palm persists for three breaths, crushing all rock and soil in its path.
spell.immortal_cultivation_mod.weiya.des: A pressure aura technique that may be activated at will. Vast cultivation pressure radiates from your body, consuming 1% of your total qi each second while suppressing creatures whose cultivation is below your own.
spell.immortal_cultivation_mod.zibao.des: Burn all remaining lifespan and detonate your body at your location. Explosion radius: Jindan 50 blocks, Yuanying 80, Huashen 100, Lianxu 200, Heti 300, Dacheng 400, Dujie 500.
spell.immortal_cultivation_mod.absorb_cu: Launch a dark-aspected spirit projectile. If it strikes someone with lower cultivation, one-tenth of their cultivation progress is extracted and added to your own.
spell.immortal_cultivation_mod.tuntian.d: Devour all earth and stone within a five-meter radius, leaving nothing behind. Each block consumed advances your cultivation. The technique also devastates nearby living beings, and slain foes have their essence absorbed to greatly increase your cultivation.
spell.immortal_cultivation_mod.fengya.de: A toggleable secret technique. After channeling power, every punch—whether through the air, against stone, or at an enemy—unleashes a spiraling cone of compressed wind. Upon reaching the Jindan Realm, concealed punches can summon a far larger wind cone.
Silently recite an arcane incantation and launch a metal-aspected spirit projectile. Targets with lower cultivation become rigid and unable to move for a short time.
spell.immortal_cultivation_mod.yinlei_ju: Commune with the spiritual energies of heaven and earth, launch a lightning talisman, and call down heavenly lightning to strike the target.
spell.immortal_cultivation_mod.wulei_zhe: An orthodox Daoist lightning art. Palm lightning and heavenly thunder descend together as five mighty lightning pillars, specializing in the destruction of evil spirits and demonic beings.
spell.immortal_cultivation_mod.liuguang_: 50 sword-light balls, 50 damage each; charged casts spawn up to 80

Release fifty sword-light balls in every direction, or up to eighty when fully charged. Each changes direction after striking blocks, striking enemies, flying ten blocks, or reaching a ten-block radius from the caster; radius redirects pick another non-outward direction rather than always returning straight to the caster. A projectile disappears after its twentieth direction change.
spell.immortal_cultivation_mod.sifang_ji: Mini protective barrier shelters 3-5 cultivators, blocks poison and low-grade illusions.
spell.immortal_cultivation_mod.gushi_shi: Earth true essence forms sturdy stone shield, withstands slashes and blunt strikes, blocks common elemental spells.
spell.immortal_cultivation_mod.kongshi_s: Bind a zombie or corpse as your servant. Targets below your cultivation, or no more than one major realm above you, can be controlled.
Cultivating this method refines your own blood essence into Blood Qi. Thereafter, techniques and cultivation arts consume Blood Qi instead of Spiritual Qi.
Upon mastery, you naturally acquire the Absorb technique. Striking those of lower cultivation allows you to seize their cultivation and strengthen your own Dao foundation.
This method grants the divine power of Devouring Heaven, allowing the user to consume earth, stone, and living beings, transforming their essence into cultivation progress.
Mastering this method grants the Wind Pressure technique. Every punch tears through the air with destructive wind cones capable of injuring enemies and shattering stone.
Spiritual qi subtly nourishes the surroundings, causing nearby plants to flourish, though wild weeds and thorns will not grow.

When a cultivator falls for the first time, death does not come immediately. The soul persists as a spirit form for the duration of an incense stick, leaving a trail of flames before reforming the body with a final spark of life. Once the body has fully recovered, this life-saving ability may be used again.
All spiritual qi becomes extreme cold yin qi. It freezes water vapor, seals meridians, and grants the personal spells Cold Crystal Lock Claw, Frost Heaven Cry, and Frost-Shattering Skyglide.
spell.immortal_cultivation_mod.hanjing_s: Gather ice qi into the fingers, dash forward, and seize the target with frozen claws. Lower-level targets receive Frozen Qi, stopping automatic qi regeneration.
spell.immortal_cultivation_mod.shuangtia: Release a mournful cry of extreme cold. The projectile blooms into a freezing field on impact. Lower-level targets become Frozen and Dazed, preventing spell casting.
spell.immortal_cultivation_mod.suishuang: Condense frost clouds beneath the feet and skim through the air at high speed. It only works at low altitude and drains qi quickly.
Look at a released flying sword and cast this art to draw it behind your back. The description button toggles between selecting only the sword you are looking at and selecting all your released swords within 3 blocks. Controlled swords form one rotating back ring with every sword tip pointing outward; punch fires one, while a concealed strike fires up to six.
message.immortal_cultivation_mod.yuqi_mo: Imperial Artifact Art: looked-at sword control
tooltip.immortal_cultivation_mod.jade_pe: Waist accessory: doubles meditation progress and method proficiency gain.
message.immortal_cultivation_mod.materia: Hold exactly 1 material to check purity.
tooltip.immortal_cultivation_mod.shift_f: Hold Shift to show material buff
tooltip.immortal_cultivation_mod.materia: Material buff: each Refined Iron Motherstone adds +5% max durability.
Material buff: each Qiannian Lingmu Heart repairs 1% durability every 5 seconds.
Material buff: each Fugu Tai makes one target armor piece lose +1% durability.
Material buff: each Yunwen Silver Crystal adds +1% injected qi damage.
Material buff: each Bisui Stone adds +1% qi regeneration.
Material buff: each Hanpo Jade adds +1 slowness layer.
Material buff: each Moxuan Iron adds +1% weapon damage against armored targets.
Material buff: each Liujin Sand adds +5% quality and is consumed by forging.
Material buff: Dragon Pressure, best for defensive armor and shields.
Material buff: Star Essence, improves growth potential.
Material buff: Fire Storage, improves fire storage and amplification.
tooltip.immortal_cultivation_mod.forged_: Forged buff: repairs %s%% durability every 5 seconds
Forged buff: +%s%% target armor durability erosion
Forged buff: +%s%% weapon damage against armored targets
spell.immortal_cultivation_mod.xuying_ta: A movement spell that grants speed. While running, it leaves a transparent shadow every 2 seconds. When the shadow is shattered, it makes a small explosion and drains 10 thoughts from players within 2 blocks.
spell.immortal_cultivation_mod.duanliu_k: Fire a projectile that forms a blue dome for 1 minute. Players inside may leave, but players outside cannot enter. Inside the dome, qi regeneration stops and 3% max qi drains each second. Qi-driven spell projectiles that touch the barrier disperse.
Spend 100 qi and 10 thoughts to launch a thorn. The thorn deals no damage, but a player hit by it loses 20 thoughts.
